title: EndUser
description: A Wootric end user who can receive surveys and provide feedback

id.description: Unique identifier for the end user

external_id.description: External identifier from the integrating system

external_created_at.description: Unix timestamp of when the user was created in the external system

last_surveyed.description: Unix timestamp of the last survey sent to this user

surveys_disabled.description: Whether all surveys are disabled for this user

properties.description: Custom key-value properties for segmentation and personalization

created_at.description: Unix timestamp of when this record was created in Wootric

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp of when this record was last updated
